name: Amulet of Restoration
description: Notes The cooldown of Last Stand and Soul Concentration resets after entering a portal. This essentially makes soul concentration a once-per-dungeon activation unless you have been in the same dungeon for over 30 minutes.
effects: +60 HP, +60 MP, +3 ATT, +3 DEF, +3 SPD, +3 DEX, +3 VIT, +3 WIS

Soul Concentration: On taking damage when below 20% HP gain Invulnerable for 2 seconds and heal 120 HP Last Stand: On shooting below 20% HP gain Healing, Berserk and Armored for 4 seconds Soul Concentration Cooldown: 1800 seconds Last Stand Cooldown: 30 seconds
